title: Update cli.py to load config and use config-driven runner instantiation
description: Modify make_services() in cli.py to: (1) call load_config(root) to get OrchestratorConfig, (2) resolve backend name from runner_backend arg > $ORCHESTRATOR_RUNNER > config.default_runner, (3) get BackendConfig via config.backend(backend_name), (4) instantiate the correct runner class with config and backend_cfg, (5) pass config to Scheduler as config=config kwarg, (6) pass config to PlanningService. Remove the _RUNNERS dict and associated imports. Update build_parser() --runner choices to use hardcoded ['codex', 'claude'] or derive from config. Update Scheduler.__init__ to accept an optional config keyword argument.
acceptance_criteria: make_services() calls load_config(root) and resolves backend from arg > env > config.default_runner
Unknown backend raises SystemExit listing valid options from config.backends.keys()
Runner is instantiated with config=config, backend=backend_cfg
Default runner 'codex' string no longer hardcoded in make_services (uses config.default_runner)
